ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "tot_rms_abv_grd" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms above ground */,
  "gr_liv_area" INTEGER /* Above ground living area in square feet */,
  "total_bsmt_sf" INTEGER /* Total basement area in square feet */,
  "first_flr_sf" INTEGER /* First floor area in square feet */,
  "garage_cars" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "garage_area" INTEGER /* Garage area in square feet */,
  "full_bath" INTEGER /* Number of full bathrooms */,
  "half_bath" INTEGER /* Number of half bathrooms */,
  "overall_qual" INTEGER /* Overall quality rating (1-10 scale) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Sale price of the property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency the agent is affiliated with */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Real estate license number of the agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent handling the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client purchasing the property */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission earned on the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "preferred_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred agent for the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_preferred_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., Single Family, Condo) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Pool, Fireplace) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the trend data */,
  "average_price" INTEGER /* Average sale price for that year */,
  "properties_sold" INTEGER /* Number of properties sold during that year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Agent, Client) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Actual report data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report share */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the report */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user the report was shared with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who left the review */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent being reviewed */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the client (1-5 scale) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Actual review text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite property */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who favorited the property */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the favorited property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
